use_cases: Full-screen landing page hero sections with immersive 3D backgrounds
Product showcases with integrated Spline 3D animations and gradient overlays
Modern SaaS and fintech marketing pages requiring visual impact
Interactive landing pages with scroll-triggered animations
Product demo sections with dark-themed 3D visual effects
ai_summary: A full-screen hero section component featuring a dynamic 3D Spline background with gradient overlays and dark aesthetic. Includes interactive elements, scroll animations, and a product screenshot showcase section. Built for modern landing pages requiring immersive 3D visuals with professional dark theme styling.
